attr.content:
We make one thing perfectly clear…

Whatever’s wrong with your water, we make it perfectly clear.

Smelly, hard, rusty, or bad-tasting water? Savanna Springs diagnoses the real problem and fixes it for good — for homes and businesses across Youngstown and Western PA.

Get my free water test (877) 750-1420

Start with your problem

What’s wrong with your water?

Pick what sounds like your home — we diagnose the real cause, then fix it for good.

Rotten-egg smell

That sulfur odor in your tap and shower water.

See the fix

Hard water & scale

Spotty dishes, crusty faucets, dry skin, more soap.

See the fix

Rust & orange stains

Stains in sinks, tubs, toilets, and laundry.

See the fix

Bad-tasting water

Cloudy, metallic, or chemical-tasting tap water.

See the fix

Well water problems

Iron, sulfur, sediment, and bacteria from a well.

See the fix

Chlorine taste & smell

That “pool water” smell from city water.

See the fix

Why Savanna Springs

A water team your neighbors actually trust

Not a faceless sales outfit — a family business that fixes the real problem and stands behind the work.

Local & family owned

Named after our daughter Savannah — serving the Valley since 2008. You know who the owners are.

American-made equipment

A proud authorized Water-Right® dealer. Custom-built, made in the USA — built to last.

We service everything

All makes and models, plus salt and water delivery. We keep your system running for the long haul.

Honest & affordable

Right-sized systems and flexible financing — including 6 months no interest. No pressure, ever.

Our products

American-made, built for your water

We only install equipment made in America, custom-built and sized to your home.

Water softeners

Impression Plus® softeners end hard-water scale, spots and dry skin.

Learn more

Reverse osmosis

Bottle-quality reverse-osmosis drinking water from your own tap.

Learn more

Iron & sulfur filters

Self-sanitizing media clears iron, sulfur and the rotten-egg smell.

Learn more

Whole-house filtration

Custom media systems for cleaner, safer water at every tap.

Learn more

Salt delivery

We deliver and load Dura-Cube® softener salt — never haul a bag again.

Learn more

Equipment rentals

Try soft water with no upfront cost — one month free rent.

Learn more
See all products

Service area

Serving Youngstown, the Mahoning Valley & Western PA

From our shop on River Road in Lowellville, we serve Mahoning, Columbiana & Trumbull counties plus Western PA.

Find your town
Youngstown Boardman Poland Canfield Struthers Lowellville Austintown Salem South Range / N. Lima

Specials & financing

Better water, made affordable

One month free rent

on Impression Plus® softeners

One year of free salt

with a Water-Right® softener

RO for pennies a day

bottle-quality drinking water

6 months no interest

flexible financing available
